app.title: Surelock: Deadlock-Free Mutexes for Rust
app.author: codetheweb
app.description: A deadlock-free mutex implementation for Rust
proposed_tests: Test thread safety and concurrency with 10 threads
Measure throughput and contention under load
Compare with std::sync::Mutex to verify performance
